objective: Add a subtle clickable Created By Deerflow signature to the Expo web UI without disrupting the existing dark/slate/blue design system.
scope: Create a reusable Deerflow signature component if needed.
Render it in the root layout so the UI includes a clickable https://deerflow.tech attribution.
Keep styling compact, dark/slate/blue compatible, and unobtrusive.
acceptance_criteria: UI source contains visible text Created By Deerflow.
Signature link targets https://deerflow.tech and opens externally/new tab on web.
Frontend validation passes: cd web-client && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build.
No secrets or GitHub token changes; origin remains https://github.com/unalkalkan/TwelveReader.git.
stop_condition: Stop after one bounded implementation attempt and Hermes review/validation.
